name: Produce 101
overview: Produce 101 (프로듀스 101) is a reality music group survival show on Mnet. It is a large-scale project in which the public "produces" a unit group by choosing members from a pool of 101 trainees from 46 entertainment companies as well as the group's concept, debut song, and group name.

trailers.title: [Produce 101][Teaser] Make the Girls’ Dream Come True EP.01 20160122
